description.description: Defines a general description applicable to the resource or module, can be null if not used.

http_keep_alive_timeout_sec.description: Specifies the keep-alive timeout in seconds for HTTP connections. Must be a positive integer if provided.

name.description: Sets the name for the resource, which must be a non-empty string and adhere to naming conventions.

project.description: Indicates the project associated with the resource. Can be null if not specifically required.

proxy_bind.description: Determines whether to bind the proxy, accepting a boolean value. True enables binding.

timeouts.description: Specifies the timeout settings for create, delete, and update operations. Each can be a string duration, such as '30m'.

url_map.description: Associates a URL map with the resource, requiring a valid string reference to an existing URL map.
